parameters.content:
## 🤖 L2LAAF Orchestrator
**Phase:** 42.1.18
**Commit:** fix(cicd): revert to POST activate endpoint to resolve 405 Method Not Allowed error v11.42.1.18

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "cardsV2": [ { "cardId": "l2laaf_blocked_gate", "card": { "header": { "title": "⛔ L2LAAF Deployment BLOCKED", "subtitle": "Phase " + $json.updated_state.current_phase }, "sections": [{ "widgets": [{ "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Reason", "text": $json.throttle_message, "wrapText": true } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Blocked Payload", "text": $json.meta.summary, "wrapText": true } }] }] } } ] } }}

={{ { "cardsV2": [ { "cardId": "l2laaf_deploy_gate", "card": { "header": { "title": "🚀 L2LAAF Deployment: Phase " + $json.updated_state.current_phase, "subtitle": "Status: " + $json.system_status + " | Intent: " + $json.intent }, "sections": [{ "widgets": [{ "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Build Details", "text": $json.meta.summary, "wrapText": true } }, { "decoratedText": { "topLabel": "Throttle Evaluation", "text": $json.throttle_message, "wrapText": true } }, { "buttonList": { "buttons": [{ "text": "APPROVE", "onClick": { "openLink": { "url": "https://local2local.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/approve-promotion?action=approve&env=" + $json.updated_state.active_environment + "&build_id=" + $json.meta.build_id + "&phase=" + $json.updated_state.current_phase + "&hbrId=" + $json.meta.hbrId } } }, { "text": "DECLINE", "onClick": { "openLink": { "url": "https://local2local.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/approve-promotion?action=decline&env=" + $json.updated_state.active_environment + "&build_id=" + $json.meta.build_id + "&phase=" + $json.updated_state.current_phase + "&hbrId=" + $json.meta.hbrId } } }] } }] }] } } ] } }}

={{ { "resourceNames": [ "projects/" + ($('Approval Listener').first().json.query.env === 'prod' ? 'local2local-prod' : 'local2local-dev') ], "filter": "textPayload:\"Null check operator used on a null value\"", "pageSize": 10 } }}
